results.title: Canada's Alternative Lending Market Poised for Robust Growth, Expected to Hit $21.01 Billion by 2026
results.description: The Canadian alternative lending market offers significant growth opportunities through SME-embedded lending, BNPL regulation, open banking-driven data access, and diversified funding models. The market's expansion is driven by partnerships, regulatory scrutiny, and integration within digital platforms.
